1000634845.english: Andvari stopped crying at the sight of the dazzling cup tteokbokki, which had recently been found in large quantities and was being distributed and sold to great acclaim as rations for the soldiers.
1000634845.korean: - 얼마전 대량으로 보관된 것을 찾아서 대원들의 부식으로 절찬리에 배급, 판매중인 컵떡볶이의 영롱한 자태에 안드바리가 울음을 뚝 그쳤다.

1000634847.english: This cup tteokbokki is especially popular among the members with the youngest physical age. Naturally, Andvari could not take his eyes off it.
1000634847.korean: - 이 컵떡볶이는 특히 신체연령이 어린 대원들에게 인기. 당연하게도 안드바리는 좀처럼 눈을 떼지 못했다.

1000634849.english: After hesitating for a while, Andvari finally accepted the cup of tteokbokki I offered him with his small hand.
1000634849.korean: - 한동안 갈등하던 안드바리는 결국 조그마한 손으로 내가 내민 컵떡볶이를 받아들었다.

1000634850.english: Just as I breathed a sigh of relief, Andvari said something unexpected.
1000634850.korean: - 안도의 한숨을 내쉬는 내게, 안드바리가 의외의 말을 꺼냈다.

1000634853.english: As I answered, suppressing the pleased smile that was forming on my face without me realizing it, Andvari smiled and nodded.
1000634853.korean: - 나도 모르게 지어지는 흐뭇한 미소를 눌러 참으며 대답하자 안드바리가 웃으며 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000634855.english: Hehe, I'll be right back with the cooking!

1000634856.english: Andvari ran out of the captain's quarters, clutching the cup of tteokbokki tightly to his chest.
1000634856.korean: - 안드바리는 컵떡볶이를 소중히 품에 안고 함장실 밖으로 달려나갔다.

1000634857.english: Then, while we wait... let's finish some work with a satisfied heart.
1000634857.korean: - 그럼 기다리는 동안... 흐뭇한 마음으로 일이나 마저 하자.

1000634859.english: While I was engrossed in looking at the panel, Snow Feather came to visit.
1000634859.korean: - 패널을 한창 들여다보고 있을 때, 스노우 페더가 찾아왔다.

1000634860.english: Dr. Yang is currently undergoing an examination.

1000634861.english: As I expected, Snow Feather shook her head with a gloomy expression.
1000634861.korean: - 내 예상대로 스노우 페더는 어두운 얼굴로 고개를 저었다.

1000634862.english: It's absolute chaos. Thanks to that, Lilith and Poi are having a hard time...
1000634862.korean: 난리가 났어요. 덕분에 리리스 언니랑 포이 언니가 고생하고 있고요...

1000634863.english: was thinking about what to do when a good idea came to me.
1000634863.korean: - 어떻게 할까 고민하다 좋은 생각이 떠올랐다.

1000634865.english: I recalled Hirume looking like a frightened wild animal. Fortunately, Orca has the perfect talent.
1000634865.korean: - 마치 겁먹은 야생동물 같던 히루메의 모습을 떠올렸다. 마침 오르카엔 딱 맞는 인재들이 있다.

1000634866.english: Putting work aside for a moment, I looked at three twinkling signals deep within the small island where the Orca was anchored.
1000634866.korean: - 일은 잠시 치워두고, 오르카 호가 정박한 작은 섬의 깊은 곳에서 반짝이는 신호 세 개에 눈길을 주었다.

1000634867.english: - While waiting for the experts to return, I heard that Hirume's examination was finished.
1000634867.korean: - 전문가들이 복귀하기를 기다리는 동안 히루메의 검사가 끝났다는 소식을 들었다.

1000634868.english: - Hirume, who had entered the captain's room somewhat quietly for the interview, seemed to be in a strange state.
1000634868.korean: - 면담을 위해 다소곳이 함장실로 들어온 히루메는 어쩐지 상태가 이상해보였다.

1000634869.english: - It's like he's scared, but also like he's let go of everything and become detached...
1000634869.korean: - 겁먹은 듯도 하고, 모든 것을 내려놓고 초연해진 것도 같은...

1000634870.english: - Hirume, who had been staring blankly at the ceiling for a while, opened her mouth.
1000634870.korean: - 한동안 멍하니 천장을 올려다보던 히루메가 입을 열었다.

1000634872.english: There's no need to decline. The concubine has already made her own mental preparations.
1000634872.korean: 사양할 필요 없다. 첩은 이미 마음의 준비를 했으니.

1000634873.english: No matter what happens to you... I'll just count the stains on the ceiling.
1000634873.korean: 그대에게 무슨 짓을 당하더라도... 첩은 그저 천장의 얼룩이나 세고 있겠다.

1000634874.english: I think there was a slight... misunderstanding.

1000634875.english: During the examination, he kept getting scared and then crying...
1000634875.korean: 검사를 하시는 동안 계속... 겁에 질렸다가 울먹이시다가...

1000634876.english: White child. Won't you please give up your seat?

1000634877.english: Even if it is an act without love... At first, there is no eye to see-
1000634877.korean: 비록 사랑이 없는 행위더라도... 처음은 보는 눈이 없는-

1000634878.english: ...No. Do you need a child to take care of things?

1000634879.english: - Hirume's sorrowful eyes turned to me.

1000634880.english: Haha, you seem to have a higher status than a concubine would think.
1000634880.korean: 후후, 그대는 첩의 생각보다 신분이 높은 것 같구나.

1000634883.english: - I felt a sense of familiarity in the Bioroid I was seeing for the first time.
1000634883.korean: - 처음 보는 바이오로이드에게서 어쩐지 익숙한 모습이 느껴졌다.

1000634884.english: - More specifically, the image of the agent who is obviously secretly filming this scene right now...
1000634884.korean: - 좀 더 구체적으로는, 지금 이 장면을 몰래 촬영하고 있을게 분명한 대원의 모습이...

1000634885.english: - While I was debating whether or not to clear up Hirume's misunderstanding, the door to the captain's cabin opened wide.
1000634885.korean: - 히루메의 오해를 풀어줄지 말지 고민하고 있을 때, 함장실 문이 벌컥 열렸다.

1000634886.english: Hello! I heard there's a new Bioroid here, so I came to see you!

1000634887.english: Could this be... Could this be...! Isn't this the Hirume girl of the Heavenly Fragrance!
1000634887.korean: 이분은 설마... 설마...! 천향의 히루메 아가씨가 아니십니까!

1000634888.english: Sir, do you know Miss Hirume?

1000634890.english: The essence of Saman Industry's Origin Dust and biotechnology at its peak!
1000634890.korean: 극에 달한 삼안 산업의 오리진 더스트와 생명공학 기술의 정수!

1000634891.english: Among all the Bioroids, you are one of the most beautifully harmonized animal genes!
1000634891.korean: 여러 바이오로이드들 중에서도 손꼽히도록 아름답게 조화된 동물 유전자를 가진 분이십니다!

1000634892.english: This is the sixth... no, seventh reason I regret not having awakened in the past!
1000634892.korean: 제가 과거에 각성하지 못했던 것을 후회하는 이유 중에 여섯... 아니, 일곱 번째정도 되지요!

1000634893.english: Kuhuhu, doesn't that mean there are still many beautiful things left in this world!
1000634893.korean: 쿠후후, 그만큼 이 세상엔 아름다운 것들이 많이 남아있다는 것 아니겠습니까!

1000634894.english: In that sense, Miss Hirume. Could you please give me just one strand of your hair... no, just one strand of that dazzlingly beautiful golden tail feather?
1000634894.korean: 그런 의미에서 히루메 아가씨. 머리카락... 이 아니라, 그 눈부시게 아름다운 황금빛 꼬리털을 한 가닥만, 주실 수 있습니까?

1000634898.english: It's not a well-known fact, but foxes are extremely alert animals.
1000634898.korean: 잘 알려진 사실은 아니지만, 여우는 굉~장히 경계심이 강한 동물입니다.

1000634899.english: It is said that Miss Hirume, who has a fantastic blend of fox genes, is also very wary of others.
1000634899.korean: 그 여우 유전자가 환~상적으로 조화된 히루메 아가씨도, 마찬가지로 타인에 대한 경계심이 몹시 강하다고 하지요.

1000634900.english: Because of that, your affiliation changed from Companion to Battle Maid-
1000634900.korean: 그것 때문에 컴패니언에서 배틀 메이드로 소속이 바뀌셨-

1000634902.english: It was just more suitable for demonstrating the concubine's abilities!
1000634902.korean: 첩의 능력을 발휘하는데에 그것이 더 적합했을 뿐이니라!

1000634903.english: Oh my, I'm sorry for that.

1000634904.english: Anyway, since he is that kind of person, it would be better for the Commander to approach him very gently, without provoking him, and slowly.
1000634904.korean: 어쨌든 그런 분이시니, 사령관님께서도 아주 젠틀하게, 자극하지 않고 천천히 접근하시는 편이 좋을 겁니다.

1000634905.english: - Overwhelmed by Alfred's momentum, Hirume was now trembling.
1000634905.korean: - 알프레드의 기세에 압도된 건지, 히루메는 이젠 숫제 몸을 오들오들 떨고 있다.

1000634907.english: You... no, I was foolish to think that you were a man of dignity.
1000634907.korean: 그대... 아니, 네녀석이 품위있는 자라고 생각했던 첩이 어리석었다.

1000634909.english: How dare you defile your concubine with such perverted behavior!
1000634909.korean: 이런 변태스러운 행위로 첩을 더럽히려 하다니!

1000634910.english: - I exchanged a bewildered glance with Mr. Alfred, at a loss for words.
1000634910.korean: - 할 말을 잃은 채 Mr.알프레드와 황망한 시선을 교환했다.

1000634911.english: Look at this, Iza's arms! Those vicious arms... binding the concubine's limbs so she can't move...
1000634911.korean: 이, 이자의 팔을 보거라! 저 우악스러운 팔들로... 첩의 사지를 꼼짝 못하게 결박하고선...

1000634913.english: ...Ha, isn't that what you were trying to do!

1000634914.english: I told you to approach it gently...

1000634918.english: Huh?! Don't you know I can't even touch you, Bioroids!
1000634918.korean: 예?! 저는 바이오로이드 여러분께 손도 못 대는 걸 아시지 않습니까!

1000634919.english: And please make sure to add Mr!

1000634920.english: - Snow Feather's cold gaze turned to Alfred, who jumped up and denied it.
1000634920.korean: - 펄쩍 뛰며 부인하는 알프레드에게 스노우 페더의 차가운 눈빛이 향했다.

1000634925.english: Ugh... I'd rather be treated like that by Miss Feather or Miss Sunny...
1000634925.korean: 크흑... 페더 양이나 써니 양에게 그런 취급을 받을 바에는 차라리...

1000634926.english: Oh... why is it like this...

1000634927.english: The concubine just wanted... a place to rest her mind...
1000634927.korean: 첩은 그저... 마음을 쉴 곳을 바랐을 뿐이거늘...

1000634928.english: - Meanwhile, Hirume was lost in her own world, not paying any attention to us.
1000634928.korean: - 그러는 와중, 히루메는 우리에게 신경도 쓰지 않고 혼자만의 세계에 빠져 있었다.

1000634929.english: Ahem. Since you said you came in hiding, you must have been alive for a long time, right?
1000634929.korean: 흠흠. 숨어들어오셨다고 했으니, 분명 오래 살아오신 분이겠지요?

1000634930.english: - I looked over the data on the 'Heavenly Hirume' model sent by Constance and the results of the doctor's interview and answered.
1000634930.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 보내온 '천향의 히루메' 모델에 대한 자료와 닥터의 인터뷰 결과를 훑어보며 대답했다.

1000634931.english: - Produced after the outbreak of the Destruction War, his unit was destroyed in the first battle... He's been a wanderer ever since...
1000634931.korean: - 멸망전쟁 발발 후 생산되고, 첫 전투에서 소속 부대가 와해... 그 이후로 쭉 떠돌이 생활이라...

1000634932.english: You've been alone all along. Hmm, I got the answer.
1000634932.korean: 줄곧 혼자 지내신 거군요. 흠, 답이 나왔습니다.

1000634934.english: Yes. As far as I know, Miss Hirume was judged to be unsuitable for escort due to her high level of vigilance, but not to this extent.
1000634934.korean: 그렇습니다. 제가 알기로 히루메 아가씨는 경계심이 강해 호위에 부적합하다는 판정이 내려졌긴 해도, 이정도 까지는 아니었습니다.

1000634935.english: Time has changed the young lady. Just like me, Mr. Alfred, who was reborn!
1000634935.korean: 세월이 아가씨를 변하게 한 거지요. 바로 저, 다시 태어난 Mr.알프레드 처럼!

1000634936.english: I understand. It's fortunate that I was saved by the leader, but if I had lived alone all this time...
1000634936.korean: 이해가 가요. 저도 리더에게 구해졌기에 망정이지, 쭉 혼자 살아왔다면...

1000634937.english: For now, yes. Didn't Miss Feather get used to it quickly?
1000634937.korean: 일단은 그렇습니다. 페더 양도 금세 익숙해지지 않았습니까?

1000634938.english: If only a little time passes, Miss Hirume will also let down her guard.
1000634938.korean: 조금만 시간이 흐른다면, 히루메 아가씨도 경계를 푸실 겁니다.

1000634940.english: West, really... you did that like that...?

1000634941.english: Yes, you. Just how far are you trying to corrupt your concubine...!
1000634941.korean: 네, 네놈. 대체 첩을 어디까지 타락시키려는 것이더냐...!

1000634942.english: ......Ku, khuhuhu... It might take a little... a lot of time.
1000634942.korean: ......쿠, 쿠후후... 조금... 많~은 시간이 필요할지도 모르겠습니다.

1000634943.english: - And now you've fallen too... Now Hirume is covering her chest with both arms and glaring at me as if I'm her mortal enemy.
1000634943.korean: - 그대로 시작해서 네놈까지 떨어져버렸나... 이제 히루메는 양 팔로 가슴을 가린 채 나를 철천지 원수라도 되는 것처럼 노려보고 있다.

1000634944.english: - A message arrived saying that the agents we had been waiting for had returned.
1000634944.korean: - 마침 기다리던 대원들이 복귀했다는 메세지가 도착했다.

1000634945.english: "Who should I put you in charge of? Vanilla... won't do. If Hirume heard you said that to me, I might make her cry with just a few words."
1000634945.korean: - 누굴 붙여줘야 되지? 바닐라... 는 안되겠고. 나한테 이런 말을 했단 걸 들으면 말 몇마디로 히루메를 울려버릴지도 모른다.

1000634946.english: - If it's Black Wyrm, I'll respond calmly no matter what reaction it gets.
1000634946.korean: - 블랙 웜이라면 무슨 반응이 나와도 침착하게 대응해 주겠지.

1000634947.english: Understood. Miss Black Wyrm and I will take good care of you!
1000634947.korean: 알겠습니다. 저와 블랙 웜 아가씨가 잘 보살피고 있겠습니다!

1000634949.english: - I called out to a crew member as I left the captain's cabin, looking at Hirume, who was looking at me with longing eyes.
1000634949.korean: - 함장실을 나서며 내게 애타는 눈길을 보내는 히루메를 마중하며 한 대원을 호출했다.

1000634950.english: Orca's informant, Talonfeather, appeared in the captain's quarters as soon as he was called.
1000634950.korean: - 오르카의 정보통, 탈론페더는 호출하자마자 함장실에 나타났다.

1000634953.english: Hehehe, here is what you were looking for.

1000634954.english: With 5 multi-point views and vivid sound quality, it will be helpful.
1000634954.korean: 5개 다중 시점에, 음질도 생생하니 도움이 되실 거예요.

1000634956.english: - ...That guy handed it over as if he had been waiting for me to call...
1000634956.korean: - ...그녀석, 내가 부를 걸 기다리고 있었다는 듯이 넘겨줬지...

1000634957.english: While I was aimlessly looking under the desk or behind the flowerpot with a complicated feeling, the door to the captain's cabin opened.
1000634957.korean: - 복잡한 기분으로 괜히 책상 아래나 화분 뒤를 살펴보는 도중 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000634960.english: Ah, hello... Sorry for not knocking...

1000634961.english: You called me to play board games again, right?

1000634962.english: I picked up Ella, who was snuggling into my arms, and sat her on the sofa.
1000634962.korean: - 품에 파고드는 엘라를 안아들어 소파에 앉혔다.

1000634965.english: I heard a new companion joined, is that it?
1000634965.korean: 컴패니언 애가 새로 들어왔다고 들었는데, 그거지?

1000634966.english: I heard she's a Battle Maid, not a Companion?

1000634967.english: Huh? Then why did you call us? Did you really call us to play a board game?
1000634967.korean: 엥? 그럼 우린 왜 불렀어? 진짜 보드게임 하려고 부른거야?

1000634969.english: Smiling at Empress, who was grumbling, "It's no fun because Ella wins every day," he picked up Setti and sat her on the sofa.
1000634969.korean: - 엘라가 맨날 이겨서 재미없단 말야- 하고 툴툴대는 엠프리스에게 웃어주며 세띠도 안아들어 소파에 앉혀주었다.

1000634971.english: Hmm... this is definitely worth asking us.
1000634971.korean: 흠... 이건 확실히 우리한테 물어볼만 하네.

1000634972.english: - Explained the situation while watching the video filmed by Talon Feather.
1000634972.korean: - 탈론 페더가 찍은 영상을 보며 상황을 설명했다.

1000634973.english: By the way, this guy's filming skills are improving day by day...
1000634973.korean: - 그런데 이녀석, 촬영 기술이 날이 갈수록 발전하는군...

1000634974.english: You are a Battle Maid only in your affiliation, but you have animal genes like a Companion, right?
1000634974.korean: 소속만 배틀메이드이시고, 컴패니언처럼 동물 유전자를 가지고 계신거죠?

1000634975.english: You've come to the right place. This is our specialty!

1000634976.english: I don't know much about animals...

1000634977.english: It's okay. You've seen plenty of it while you've been with us, haven't you?
1000634977.korean: 괜찮아. 우리랑 같이 있으면서 많이 봤잖아?

1000634978.english: He probably knows better than the commander.

1000634979.english: Seti, who had been intently watching the video of me and Hirume talking, spoke up.
1000634979.korean: - 나와 히루메가 이야기하는 영상을 유심히 들여다보던 세띠가 입을 열았다.

1000634981.english: Such a wary child... Oh, I'm sorry.
1000634981.korean: 이렇게 경계심이 심한 아이... 앗, 죄송합니다.

1000634982.english: It takes a lot of time to approach someone who is this wary.
1000634982.korean: 이렇게 경계심이 심한 분에게 접근하려면 시간이 많이 필요해요.

1000634983.english: That's right. At this level, even an animal wouldn't be able to handle it in a day or two.
1000634983.korean: 맞아. 이정도라면 동물이라도 하루이틀로 안 돼.

1000634984.english: Moreover, if it is a bioroid...

1000634986.english: Commander, why don't you just give the order? Tell them to open their hearts to me.
1000634986.korean: 사령관, 그냥 명령해버리지 그래? 나한테 마음을 열거라~ 하고.

1000634987.english: You can force actions through commands, but you cannot control the mind.
1000634987.korean: - 명령을 통해 행동을 강제할 수는 있지만, 마음까지 어떻게 할 수는 없다.

1000634988.english: Even if it were possible, I wouldn't want to go that far...
1000634988.korean: - 만약 된다고 하더라도, 그런 방법까지 쓰고싶지는 않고...

1000634989.english: Well then, that's the straightforward approach.

1000634990.english: I guess I have no choice but to take my time, slowly and carefully.
1000634990.korean: 천천히 조심스럽게, 시간을 들이는 수밖에 없겠어요.

1000634991.english: Leaving aside the strange delusions, it seems like he is showing excessive vigilance not only toward me but also toward the other team members.
1000634991.korean: - 이상한 망상은 그렇다치고, 나는 물론 다른 대원들에게까지 과도한 경계심을 보이는 것 같다.

1000634992.english: From my perspective... it seems like there is fear behind this wariness.
1000634992.korean: 제가 보기엔... 이 경계심의 이면엔 두려움이 있는 것 같아요.

1000634994.english: Hirume was certainly in a state of fear the whole time.

1000634995.english: Yeah. Like a small wild animal trembling but baring its teeth or claws?
1000634995.korean: - 그래. 작은 야생동물이 벌벌 떨면서도 이빨이나 발톱을 드러내는 것 같은?

1000634996.english: I'm not sure if this applies to bioroids with mixed animal genes, but...
1000634996.korean: 동물 유전자가 섞인 바이오로이드 분에게도 통용되는지는 모르겠지만...

1000634997.english: If it is a normal animal, you must first make it realize that the Commander is a harmless being.
1000634997.korean: 일반적인 동물이라면 일단 사령관님이 무해한 존재라는 것을 인식시켜야 해요.

1000634998.english: Gradually increase the time spent in the same space over time, and handle it carefully as well.
1000634998.korean: 시간을 두고 같은 공간에 있는 시간을 점점 늘려나가고, 조심스럽게 핸들링도 해주고요.

1000634999.english: Could the smell... also have an effect?

1000635000.english: Wouldn't you agree? I heard animal gene expression is strong. The Companions like the Commander's scent, too.
1000635000.korean: 그렇지 않을까? 동물 유전자 발현이 강하다며. 컴패니언 애들도 사령관 냄새 좋아하니까.

1000635001.english: I recalled how Hachiko and Fenrir would always bury their faces deep and inhale deeply whenever they ran to me and hugged me.
1000635001.korean: - 하치코와 펜리르가 내게 달려와 안길땐 꼭 얼굴을 깊게 묻으며 숨을 들이마시던 것을 떠올렸다.

1000635002.english: I think it was the same for Ferro, Poi, and Snow Feather, but for Lilith... the meaning would be a little different.
1000635002.korean: - 페로랑 포이, 스노우 페더도 그랬던 것 같고, 리리스... 는 의미가 조금 다르겠군.

1000635003.english: This method is limited to small animals; usually, you place food on your hand and feed them to help them get used to the smell.
1000635003.korean: 이건 작은 동물에 한정되는 방법인데요, 보통 손에 먹이를 올려놓고 먹여주면서 냄새에 익숙해지게 만들어요.

1000635004.english: Setti said that, took Tiger out of the cage, and placed him in his hand.
1000635004.korean: - 세띠는 그렇게 말하며 케이지에서 타이거를 꺼내 손에 올려놓았다.

1000635005.english: When Setti gave him sunflower seeds, Tiger, who had been sniffing around on the palm, accepted and ate them as if he were used to it.
1000635005.korean: - 세띠가 해바라기씨를 주자, 손바닥 위를 킁킁거리며 돌아다니던 타이거는 익숙한듯 받아먹었다.

1000635006.english: The bait is really effective. You can't go against instinct.
1000635006.korean: 먹이가 효과만점이긴 해. 본능을 거스를 순 없는 법이니까.

1000635007.english: That's right. I also became close with Tiger and Pengsoon quickly after feeding them.
1000635007.korean: 맞아요. 저도 타이거랑 펭순이한테 먹이 주고 나서 금방 친해졌어요.

1000635008.english: Hey, I'm telling you, it's not Pengsoon!

1000635009.english: Still, calling it 63191 is just too pitiful...

1000635010.english: There are hundreds of thousands of penguins just where I was; how could I possibly name each and every one of them?
1000635010.korean: 나 있던 데에만 펭귄이 수십 만 마리는 있는데 그걸 어떻게 일일히 이름을 붙여주겠어?

1000635011.english: Even roughly distinguishing who is who is only possible in this country.
1000635011.korean: 대충 누가 누군지 구분하는 것도 이 나라서 가능한 거라구.

1000635012.english: You're making fun of me, right?!

1000635013.english: Empress, who had been bickering and teasing me, turned her gaze toward Seti, who was hesitating.
1000635013.korean: - 나와 투닥이며 장난을 치던 엠프리스가 우물쭈물하는 세띠에게 시선을 향했다.

1000635017.english: Now, Commander. You hug Tiger too.

1000635018.english: Empress took the tiger from Seti's hand and placed it in my hand.
1000635018.korean: - 엠프리스는 세띠의 손에서 타이거를 받아들더니 내 손에 올려주었다.

1000635019.english: With a soft, fluffy texture, Tiger tilts his head and looks up at me.
1000635019.korean: - 폭신말랑한 감촉과 함께 타이거가 고개를 갸웃하며 나를 올려다본다.

1000635021.english: It's okay. Try stroking it gently.

1000635022.english: When I tickled his belly with my finger, Tiger curled up as if he felt good.
1000635022.korean: - 손가락으로 배를 간질여주자 타이거는 기분좋은듯 몸을 말았다.

1000635023.english: Wow, Commander, you're talented! You're getting along so fast.
1000635023.korean: 우와, 사령관 재능 있는걸? 금방 친해지네.

1000635026.english: As Tiger was carefully returned, Setti, who had been fidgeting, let out a sigh of relief.
1000635026.korean: - 조심스레 타이거를 돌려주자 안절부절 못하던 세띠가 안도의 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000635027.english: I, I'm sorry... Tiger tends to be sensitive, so I was worried...
1000635027.korean: 죄, 죄송해요... 타이거는 예민한 편이라 걱정되서...

1000635028.english: That's so overprotective. I have to raise her to be strong like our Pengsoon!
1000635028.korean: 과보호야, 과보호. 우리 펭순이처럼 강하게 키워야지!

1000635029.english: Yes, because there are many cute children.

1000635030.english: Commander, you know? You shouldn't believe everything Seti says.
1000635030.korean: 사령관, 알지? 세띠 말 다 믿으면 안 돼.

1000635031.english: He has unique tastes, so I'm telling you, he finds everything cute.
1000635031.korean: 얘는 취향이 좀 독특해서, 별 걸 다 귀엽다고 한다니까?

1000635032.english: That's right. We were watching a documentary about the apocalypse together before, and they were saying that deep-sea fish are cute, you know?
1000635032.korean: 맞아요. 전에 같이 멸망 전의 다큐멘터리를 보는데, 심해어도 귀엽다고 하더라니까요?

1000635033.english: I, I'm telling you, it's really cute...

1000635034.english: Before we knew it, the three of them had drifted into small talk. Well, they've heard enough of the story, so it should be fine.
1000635034.korean: - 어느새 셋의 이야기는 잡담으로 흘러갔다. 뭐, 어느정도 이야기는 들었으니 괜찮겠지.

1000635035.english: To summarize, you need to approach it slowly and take your time, and get used to being in the same space...
1000635035.korean: - 정리하면 천천히 시간을 들여서 접근, 같은 공간에 있는 것에 익숙해져야한다라...

1000635036.english: I guess I should check on the unit securing the dock and go back to Hirume.
1000635036.korean: - 부두를 확보중인 부대를 확인하고 다시 히루메에게 가봐야겠군.

1000635037.english: - After giving instructions to the crew to secure a landing base on the large island west of where we landed, I returned to the captain's cabin.
1000635037.korean: - 우리가 상륙한 곳 서쪽의 커다란 섬에 상륙 거점을 확보하는 대원들에게 지시를 내린 뒤 함장실로 돌아왔다.

1000635038.english: - To give him time to get used to what he had learned, he sent Snow Feather out and then called Hirume.
1000635038.korean: - 배운대로 익숙해질 시간을 갖기 위해 스노우 페더도 내보낸 뒤 히루메를 호출했다.

1000635040.english: - As soon as the door opened, Hirume came rushing in and walked briskly, stopping in a place that seemed ambiguous enough to be next to me.
1000635040.korean: - 문이 열리자마자 쏜살같이 들어온 히루메는 척척 걸어와 내 옆이라고 하기엔 애매한 위치에 멈춰섰다.

1000635042.english: It's clear that he's determined to kill his concubine...!
1000635042.korean: 그자는 첩을... 살해하려고 마음 먹은 것이 분명하다...!

1000635043.english: - I rubbed the back of my neck as a headache suddenly struck me and decided to ask politely.
1000635043.korean: - 갑자기 엄습하는 두통에 뒷목을 문지르며 예의상 물어는 보기로 했다.

1000635045.english: Not a word, not a single word other than a greeting from the time I entered the room until I left!
1000635045.korean: 아무 말도, 내가 그 방에 들어가서 나올 때까지 인사 외에는 한 마디도 하지 않았다!

1000635046.english: And then... he just smiled with a blank expression...
1000635046.korean: 그, 그리고선... 무표정인 상태로 입만 빙긋...

1000635047.english: He kept glaring at his concubine with such a murderous face...!
1000635047.korean: 그런 살기가 넘치는 얼굴로 줄곧 첩을 노려보았느니라...!

1000635049.english: - Hirume nodded with a slightly relieved expression and took a step back again.
1000635049.korean: - 조금 안도한 얼굴로 고개를 끄덕인 히루메는 다시 한 발짝 물러났다.

1000635050.english: - I think I'm starting to get a feel for how to treat this girl...
1000635050.korean: - 슬슬 이 아가씨를 어떻게 대해야 할 지 감이 오는 것 같은데...

1000635051.english: - I clearly told you to slowly close the gap. I need to use what I've learned and my abilities.
1000635051.korean: - 분명 천천히 거리를 좁히라고 했었지. 배운 것과 내 능력을 활용해 봐야겠어.

1000635053.english: - I approached Hirume, who was sitting on the sofa, observing, and carefully sat down next to her.
1000635053.korean: - 소파에 앉아 눈치를 보고 있는 히루메에게 다가가 조심스럽게 옆에 앉았다.

1000635055.english: - Okay. He seems a little surprised, but not as violent as last time.
1000635055.korean: - 좋아. 조금 놀란 것 같기는 하지만, 저번처럼 격한 반응은 아니다.

1000635056.english: - Just like we did when interviewing the members, let's start by asking about old stories.
1000635056.korean: - 대원들의 면담을 진행했던 것처럼, 옛날 얘기부터 물어보자.

1000635057.english: ...is there something wrong with the tail of the concubine?

1000635058.english: - Before I knew it, I was captivated by Hirume's voluminous tail.
1000635058.korean: - 나도 모르게 히루메의 풍성한 꼬리에 눈길을 빼앗기고 말았다.

1000635059.english: - This won't do... This is an important moment.

1000635060.english: Wh, what are you talking about...! Can't you just get out of here!
1000635060.korean: 무, 무슨 말을...! 어서 떨어지지 못하겠느냐!

1000635061.english: - When I came to my senses, I found myself getting closer to Hirume without realizing it.
1000635061.korean: - 정신을 차려보니 나도 모르게 히루메에게 더욱 가까이 다가가 있었다.

1000635062.english: - I feel my mind becoming increasingly unsettled. I need to get back to the main topic...
1000635062.korean: - 점점 마음이 흐트러지는 것이 느껴진다. 어서 본론으로 돌아가야...

1000635063.english: Yes, you! You've finally revealed your true colors!

1000635064.english: Hey, can you please come down from there!

1000635065.english: - Oh, oh, oh. I was clearly trying to approach him cautiously and gently...
1000635065.korean: - 이, 이런. 분명히 조심스럽게 신사적으로 접근하려고 했는데...

1000635066.english: - Once you give up, a dark energy immediately overflows from within your heart.
1000635066.korean: - 한 번 포기하자 곧바로 마음 속에서 어두운 기운이 흘러넘친다.

1000635067.english: "There's no turning back now." Perhaps sensing his own doom, Hirume, too, was frozen, unable to even think of resisting.
1000635067.korean: - 이제 돌이킬 수 없다. 자신의 운명을 예감한 것인지, 히루메 또한 얼어붙은 채 저항할 생각도 하지 못하고 있다.

1000635070.english: - It's like silk... no, it's even more exquisite than that, and my mind is ecstatic.
1000635070.korean: - 마치 비단결... 아니, 그보다 훨씬 뛰어난 감촉에 정신이 황홀해진다.

1000635071.english: Hey, you! What are you doing! I can't let this go- Huh?!
1000635071.korean: 네, 네놈! 뭐하는 짓이더냐! 이것 놓지 못하겠- 흐앗?!

1000635072.english: - I hugged Hirume tightly as she was kicking wildly.

1000635074.english: Why, why...? Why do I feel this way...

1000635075.english: - The palm of your hand is buried in the rich tail.

1000635076.english: - Enjoy the feeling and gently stroke along the grain.
1000635076.korean: - 그 감촉을 즐기며, 결을 따라 부드럽게 쓰다듬는다.

1000635078.english: - I noticed a perked ear, but I held it together with superhuman patience.
1000635078.korean: - 쫑긋거리는 귀가 눈에 들어왔지만, 초인적인 인내심을 발휘해 참아냈다.

1000635079.english: - For now, it's the tail. Only the tail.
1000635079.korean: - 지금은 우선, 꼬리다. 오직 꼬리 뿐이다.

1000635081.english: Why... why are you so skilled...

1000635082.english: - It may be a new thing to say, but if I were to pick the members who are closest to me, my companions would be at the top of the list.
1000635082.korean: - 새삼스러운 말이지만, 나와 가장 많이 붙어있는 대원들을 꼽으라면 컴패니언이 순위권을 다툰다.

1000635083.english: - This is only natural, since the companion's mission is close protection. Thanks to that...
1000635083.korean: - 컴패니언의 임무가 근접 경호인 이상 당연한 일. 그 덕분에...

1000635084.english: - To me, a master of petting, a companion who has never been petted before... no, my former companion Bioroid is no match for me.
1000635084.korean: - 쓰다듬 마스터인 나에게, 한 번도 쓰다듬 받아본 적 없는 컴패니언... 아니, 전 컴패니언 바이오로이드가 상대가 될 리 없다.

1000635086.english: - Before I knew it, Hirume had stopped struggling and was surrendering herself to my touch with a flushed face.
1000635086.korean: - 어느새 히루메는 발버둥을 멈추고 얼굴을 발갛게 물들인 채 내 손길에 몸을 맡기고 있다.

1000635087.english: - How long has it been since I was half buried in the nine tails?
1000635087.korean: - 아홉 개의 꼬리에 반쯤 파묻힌지 얼마나 지났을까.

1000635088.english: - The moment Hirume opened her mouth with a blank expression, the captain's cabin door opened.
1000635088.korean: - 히루메가 멍한 얼굴로 입을 여는 순간 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000635092.english: - There was an awkward silence for a moment.

1000635093.english: - Only Hirume hesitated, but pressed closer.
1000635093.korean: - 오직 히루메만이 우물쭈물하면서도 더욱 몸을 붙여왔다.

1000635094.english: What are you doing, my dear?

1000635095.english: Hey, here... there's your favorite tail.
1000635095.korean: 여, 여기... 그대가 좋아하는 꼬리가 있다.

1000635097.english: Is that him? The one who sneaked in...

1000635100.english: Oh, yeah. I was just going to report that we've secured a landing base on the western island...
1000635100.korean: 아, 응. 서쪽 섬에 상륙 거점 확보했다고 보고하려구...

1000635101.english: - The reason we chose this place as our landing point was to visit the famous sunrise spot.
1000635101.korean: - 이곳을 상륙 지점으로 정한 것은 유명했던 해돋이 명소를 방문하기 위함이었다.

1000635102.english: The official report will be posted later, but for now, I'm hopeful.
1000635102.korean: 이따 정식 보고서가 올라가긴 할건데, 일단 희망적이야.

1000635103.english: There aren't that many Metal Parasites... There's a city nearby, so we're searching right now.
1000635103.korean: 철충 개체도 그렇게 많지 않고... 주변에 도시가 있어서 지금은 수색중.

1000635104.english: We're trying to be good, but what~

1000635106.english: When I go to see the sunrise and make a wish... can you be by my side?
1000635106.korean: 해돋이 보러가서 소원빌때... 내 옆에 있어주면 안 돼?

1000635109.english: Then I'll take a short break and then go back to preparing for the event.
1000635109.korean: 그럼 난 잠깐 쉬었다가 다시 행사 준비하러 갈게.

1000635110.english: - Miho seems a little strange today. Should I say she seems impatient, or maybe her mind is elsewhere?
1000635110.korean: - 오늘따라 미호가 조금 이상해보인다. 조급해보인다고 해야되나, 마음이 딴 데 가있다고 해야되나...

1000635112.english: - Hirume, who had kept her mouth shut the whole time, was sitting far away again.
1000635112.korean: - 줄곧 입을 다물고 있던 히루메는 어느새 다시 멀찍이 앉아 있었다.

1000635113.english: - I thought we were getting a little closer, but maybe not? It's hard to know even when you know each other...
1000635113.korean: - 조금 친해졌나 싶었는데, 아니었나? 알다가도 모르겠네...

1000635114.english: - I guess I'll have to search the Orca database to see if there's any useful information.
1000635114.korean: - 오르카 데이터 베이스를 검색해서 쓸만한 자료가 있는지 찾아봐야겠군.

1000635115.english: - Unless my ultimate technique works, I'll have to try other methods.
1000635115.korean: - 내 필살기가 통하지 않은 이상, 여러가지 수단을 강구해봐야 한다.

1000635116.english: - Before I could even finish speaking, Hirume jumped up and stood behind me.
1000635116.korean: - 몸을 일으키며 말을 끝맺기도 전에, 히루메는 벌떡 일어나 내 뒤에 섰다.

1000635117.english: My concubine will go too, I will go with you.

1000635118.english: - ...The Black Worm must have been pretty scary.

1000635119.english: Let's see... Is it roughly done?

1000635120.english: Haha, I'm quite pleased with how this turned out. Well then, I'll sneak out—
1000635120.korean: 하핫, 썩 마음에 들게 됐구만. 그럼 몰래 사라져 볼-

1000635121.english: What kind of behavior is this!

1000635122.english: Oh no, did I get caught?

1000635125.english: What else could it be? Preparing for the New Year's event.

1000635126.english: The Lord assigned us the mission to prepare for the event.
1000635126.korean: 주공은 우리에게 행사 준비 임무를 내렸다.

1000635127.english: Immediately remove the decorations that are ruining this harmony.
1000635127.korean: 어서 이 조화를 해치는 장식들을 철거-

1000635128.english: Wait, wait. It looks like there was some kind of misunderstanding.

1000635130.english: I also received a mission from the commander to prepare for the event.
1000635130.korean: 나도 사령관한테 행사 준비 임무를 받았다고.

1000635131.english: Here, take a look. The message.

1000635132.english: ...'Bavariana, I'm sorry, but could you help with the New Year's event preparations? Please get what you need from the Orca's warehouse or procure it from secured areas.'
1000635132.korean: ...'바바리아나, 미안한데 새해 행사 준비를 도와줄 수 있겠어? 필요한 건 오르카 호 창고에서 불출하거나 확보된 지역에서 구하도록 해.'

1000635133.english: ...'P.S. Since it's a special occasion, it would be nice if Bavariana decorated the Orca in a familiar style.'
1000635133.korean: ...'추신. 모처럼이니까, 바바리아나가 익숙한 모습으로 오르카 호를 꾸며보는 것도 좋겠어.'

1000635134.english: ......Why did My Lord send such a secret message...!

1000635135.english: Lord's voice... exactly the same, ah...

1000635136.english: Is this really the time to be clapping like that, Unnie!

1000635137.english: As if having a competitor wasn't enough, I might not be able to collect any talents at all!
1000635137.korean: 경쟁자가 생긴 것도 모자라서, 아예 달란트를 모으지 못할 수도 있다구요!

1000635140.english: Let's use that as a last resort.

1000635141.english: Oho, are you taking on the challenge?

1000635142.english: I like that. But we can't get hurt, so let's fight barehanded!
1000635142.korean: 난 좋지. 그래도 다치면 안되니까, 맨 손으로 붙어보자고!

1000635143.english: Excluding the Commander, there is no one on this Orca who can defeat Lady Bavariana!
1000635143.korean: 사령관을 제외하면 이 오르카 호에 바바리아나 님을 이길 자는 없다!

1000635145.english: Haha, it's embarrassing, but I lost miserably.

1000635146.english: It was the first time I had ever felt such a good defeat.

1000635148.english: Sister, you're thinking the wrong way...

1000635149.english: The only one who could stand a chance is... maybe Arsenal's captain?
1000635149.korean: 그나마 상대가 될만한 건... 아스널 대장 정도인가?

1000635150.english: Ah, Sadius has been putting up a good fight lately, but it's a clean sweep of losses, even if we just don't admit it.
1000635150.korean: 아, 요새 사디어스가 분전하고는 있는데, 인정만 안했을 뿐이지 깔끔한 전패야.

1000635153.english: Hehe... He is truly a dignified person...

1000635154.english: But Lord... during the day, avoid Sadius...

1000635155.english: That is proof that the commander isn't just a brute with brute strength.
1000635155.korean: 그게 바로 사령관이 무식하게 힘만 좋은 사람이 아니라는 증거지.

1000635156.english: Look. Thaddeus wants to defeat the Commander. Right?
1000635156.korean: 봐봐. 사디어스는 사령관을 이기고 싶어해. 맞지?

1000635158.english: But I keep losing. Well, I’m happy in my own way and I gain something from it, but ultimately, I’m losing.
1000635158.korean: 그런데 계속 져. 뭐, 나름대로 기쁘기도 하고 얻는것도 있겠지만 결과적으로는 진단말야.

1000635160.english: But if you keep him stuck at home even during the day, what will happen to Thaddeus? He'll get dejected, right?
1000635160.korean: 그런데 낮에도 꼼짝못하게 하면 사디어스는 어떻게 되겠어? 의기소침해지겠지?

1000635161.english: That is why the commander lets Thaddeus win during the day.
1000635161.korean: 그것 때문에 사령관이 낮에는 사디어스한테 져주는거야.

1000635165.english: There are things that burn even brighter when the roles are reversed... Ah, that’s why Thaddeus is opening his eyes to new things these days.
1000635165.korean: 입장이 뒤바뀌면 뭔가 더 불타오르는 것도 있고... 아, 그래서 요즘 사디어스가 새로운 거에 눈을 뜨고 있지.

1000635166.english: Hahaha... Sumire gathers talents and goes to be alone with the Prince- Ugh.
1000635166.korean: 후후후... 스미레는 달란트를 모아서 왕자님이랑 단 둘이- 읏.

1000635167.english: I've gone off on a tangent. Anyway, we cannot tolerate being interrupted.
1000635167.korean: 이야기가 새버렸군. 어쨌든, 우리를 방해하는 것은 용납할 수 없다.

1000635169.english: You don't seem to have any intention of yielding.

1000635170.english: Then I'll back down here. 1 against 2 is a bit of a disadvantage, isn't it?
1000635170.korean: 그럼 여기선 내가 물러나지. 1대 2는 좀 불리하잖아?

1000635172.english: Immediately withdraw from the Duke's quarters.

1000635174.english: I tried to have it all to myself, but was it not enough?

1000635175.english: Tsk. I guess I have no choice. Since I'm out scouting anyway, I should gather some reinforcements.
1000635175.korean: 쯧. 어쩔 수 없지. 탐색을 나가는 김에 나도 지원군을 좀 모아야겠어.

1000635176.english: - Although it is said that she has fox genes mixed in, Hirume has the appearance of a legendary nine-tailed fox.
1000635176.korean: - 여우 유전자가 혼합됐다고는 하나, 히루메는 전설 속 구미호의 모습을 하고 있다.

1000635177.english: - Then it might be helpful to look into that as well.
1000635177.korean: - 그렇다면 그쪽으로도 알아보는 것이 도움이 될 수 있을지도 모른다.

1000635178.english: - After looking into some materials, it was found that the common description that appeared to be that the nine-tailed fox resembled Hirume liked married women.
1000635178.korean: - 몇 가지 자료를 살펴본 결과, 공통적으로 히루메가 모습을 따간 것으로 보이는 구미호는 유부를 좋아한다는 서술이 등장했다.

1000635179.english: - I remember eating fried tofu sushi once. It wasn't Sowan, it was Kaen who made it.
1000635179.korean: - 유부 초밥은 한 번 먹은 기억이 있다. 소완이 아니라 카엔이 해줬었지.

1000635183.english: ...Yeah. Kaen made it himself. For the Lord.

1000635188.english: - After calling Caen, I returned to the captain's room with Hirume, who had been following me around.
1000635188.korean: - 카엔을 호출한 뒤, 줄곧 내 뒤를 졸졸 따라다니는 히루메와 함께 함장실로 돌아갔다.

1000635191.english: - When I asked Kaen to make me some fried tofu sushi, he immediately refused.
1000635191.korean: - 카엔에게 유부 초밥을 만들어달라고 말을 꺼낸 즉시 거절당하고 말았다.

1000635193.english: If there's only one person... it's tasteless.

1000635194.english: - Come to think of it, Kaen used to be strangely stubborn when it came to sushi.
1000635194.korean: - 그러고보니 카엔은 초밥에 한해서만은 이상하게 고집을 부리곤 했었지.

1000635195.english: - Perhaps because the area was all port cities, there was a report on the exploration of supplies that mentioned the discovery of a large quantity of well-preserved seafood.
1000635195.korean: - 근처가 전부 항구도시여서인지, 마침 물자 탐색 보고서에 잘 보존된 대량의 수산물을 발견했다는 내용이 있었다.

1000635199.english: - Let's wait a moment. Kaen came back with a plate of assorted sushi that looked delicious even at first glance.
1000635199.korean: - 잠시 기다리자 카엔이 척 보기에도 맛있어 보이는 모듬초밥 한 접시를 들고 돌아왔다.

1000635200.english: - At each end of the long line of sushi are plump fried tofu sushi.
1000635200.korean: - 길게 늘어선 초밥의 양 끝에는 통통한 유부초밥이 자리잡고 있다.

1000635202.english: - Hirume looked down at the fried tofu sushi on the plate with sparkling eyes.
1000635202.korean: - 히루메는 눈을 반짝이며 접시에 담긴 유부 초밥을 내려다 보았다.

1000635203.english: Oh, thank you. Your hospitality has made my concubine very happy.
1000635203.korean: 고, 고맙다. 그대의 대접이 첩을 몹시 기쁘게 하는구나.

1000635205.english: ...What do you think of a concubine?

1000635206.english: - Even as he grumbled, Hirume's gaze was fixed on the plump fried tofu sushi I picked up and held out to him.
1000635206.korean: - 툴툴대면서도 히루메의 시선은 내가 집어서 내민 통통한 유부초밥에 고정되어 있었다.

1000635207.english: Well, I didn't say I wouldn't eat it!

1000635208.english: - As if he thought I was joking, Hirume grabbed my hand tightly with both of his and slowly brought his mouth closer to mine.
1000635208.korean: - 장난이라도 칠 거라고 생각했는지, 히루메는 양 손으로 내 손을 단단히 붙잡고 천천히 입을 가까이했다.

1000635210.english: - I looked at Hirume, who was tasting the sushi with her eyes tightly closed, with a proud look.
1000635210.korean: - 눈을 지긋이 감고 초밥을 맛보는 히루메를 뿌듯하게 바라보았다.

1000635211.english: - Even though he's expressionless, I'm sure Kaen is proud.

1000635212.english: This is my first time tasting it. It's not bad.

1000635214.english: What did you expect? Legends are just legends.
1000635214.korean: 무얼 기대한 것이냐. 전설은 전설일 뿐이다.

1000635220.english: - I was so surprised that I accepted and ate the fried tofu sushi that Kaen offered me.
1000635220.korean: - 엉겁결에 카엔이 내민 유부초밥을 받아 먹었다.

1000635226.english: - When Kaen glared at him, Hirume flinched but cautiously approached him.
1000635226.korean: - 카엔이 째려보자 움찔하면서도 히루메는 조심스레 곁으로 다가왔다.

1000635227.english: ...My concubine made a slip of the tongue a little while ago. Actually, it was incredibly delicious.
1000635227.korean: ...조금전엔 첩이 실언을 했다. 사실, 굉장히 맛있었다.

1000635229.english: - The moment Hirume was about to put salmon sushi in her mouth with a happy face, the captain's cabin door flew open.
1000635229.korean: - 히루메가 행복한 얼굴로 연어 초밥을 입에 넣으려는 순간, 함장실 문이 벌컥 열렸다.

1000635230.english: Just as the startled Hirume dropped the sushi, an angel descended into the captain's quarters.
1000635230.korean: - 깜짝 놀란 히루메가 초밥을 떨어트리는 것과 동시에, 함장실에 천사가 강림했다.

1000635232.english: Even as I returned the greeting, my eyes were fixed on the soldiers hanging from Saraqaelael's arms.
1000635232.korean: - 인사를 받아주면서도 내 두눈은 사라카엘의 양 팔에 매달려 있는 대원들에게 고정되어 있었다.

1000635237.english: Not only did you dare violate the solemn law, but you also seduced the Order's angel...!
1000635237.korean: 감히 지엄한 율법을 어기는 것도 모자라서, 교단의 천사를 미혹하다니...!

1000635241.english: Saraqael, the Savior and Azazel's deep...

1000635243.english: That is not the case. The Savior's words are indeed the light and the will of the denomination.
1000635243.korean: 그렇지는 않습니다. 구원자의 말씀이야말로 빛과 교단의 뜻.

1000635244.english: Everything happens according to the Savior's will.
1000635244.korean: 모든 것은 구원자의 의지대로 이루어질 뿐입니다.

1000635245.english: As I mentioned, there were some issues during the restoration process. Because faith in the Savior was not complete...
1000635245.korean: 말씀드린대로 복원과정에서 조금 문제가 있었어요. 구원자에 대한 신앙이 완전하지 않아서...

1000635246.english: When the religious order has fallen into corruption, it is also my duty to set it right.
1000635246.korean: 교단이 타락했을 때, 그것을 바로잡는 것 또한 나의 의무.

1000635247.english: I will confess your sins in detail right here and now. Repent in the name of light!
1000635247.korean: 지금 이자리에서 네 죄를 낱낱히 고하겠다. 빛의 이름으로 회개하라!

1000635248.english: - It might be okay somewhere else, but not here...!
1000635248.korean: - 다른 곳이면 몰라도 여기선 안 돼...!

1000635249.english: First, the sin of seducing the angel of the order, dressing him in lewd clothing that had not even been consecrated, and defiling him over two days.
1000635249.korean: 첫 번째, 교단의 천사를 미혹하여 축성조차 받지 않은 음란한 의상을 입히고, 이틀에 걸쳐 욕보인 죄.

1000635251.english: ...Yes. It would be best if you didn't listen to it, even if it means doing it that way.

1000635252.english: Before I could stop him, embarrassing pink-hued episodes poured out of Saraqael's mouth one after another.
1000635252.korean: - 내가 제지할 틈도 없이, 사라카엘의 입에선 낯부끄러운 핑크빛 에피소드들이 줄줄 흘러나왔다.

1000635253.english: - Wait, it hasn't even been that long since it was restored, so where on earth did they hear that? I made sure Feder kept his mouth shut tight!
1000635253.korean: - 아니, 복원된지 얼마 되지도 않았는데 대체 어디서 들은거지? 페더는 입단속을 단단히 해놨는데!

1000635254.english: Eighth, the sin of issuing a worthless pseudo-currency called 'Orca Talent' in the name of the religious order.
1000635254.korean: 여덟 번째, 교단의 이름으로 '오르카 달란트'라는 볼품없는 유사 화폐를 발행한 죄.

1000635255.english: Saraqael, the Savior personally drew the design for the 'Orca Talent'.
1000635255.korean: 사라카엘님. '오르카 달란트'는 구원자께서 직접 도안을 그리셨습니다.

1000635256.english: To think you made it yourself, that sin is even heavier!
1000635256.korean: 직접 만들다니, 그 죄가 더욱 무겁다!

1000635257.english: The number of my sins that Saraqael was reciting had already started to exceed double digits.
1000635257.korean: - 사라카엘이 읊는 내 죄는 어느새 두자리 수를 넘어가기 시작했다.

1000635261.english: I expected her to shout, "I knew it! You intend to humiliate your concubine to the very last minute!" but Hirume merely let out a small sigh.
1000635261.korean: - 바로 '그럴 줄 알았느니라! 첩을 엉망진창으로 욕보일 생각인게지!' 라고 소리칠 줄 알았지만, 히루메는 작은 한숨을 내쉴 뿐이었다.

1000635262.english: ...Do not be so restless. The concubine does not mind.

1000635264.english: ...Even though the concubine doesn't care about such things...

1000635265.english: I knew you were lewd from the moment we first met in the warehouse.
1000635265.korean: 그대가 음란하다는 것은, 창고에서 처음 마주쳤을 때부터 알고 있었다.

1000635266.english: Are you planning to deny it? I clearly saw the sticky look in your eyes as you licked my tail and ears.
1000635266.korean: 발뺌할 셈이냐? 첩의 꼬리와 귀를 끈적하게 훑는 그대의 눈빛을 분명히 보았다.

1000635267.english: Or... do you want me to scream in disgust like last time? If you wish for one more charge to be added to the list of crimes the author recites, I will do so.
1000635267.korean: 아니면... 저번처럼 비명을 지르며 질색하기를 원하느냐? 저자가 읊는 죄목이 하나 더 추가되기를 바란다면 그리 하겠다.

1000635268.english: We are slowly approaching three digits.
1000635268.korean: 슬슬 세 자리 수에 다가가고 있습니다.

1000635270.english: So now it's a three-digit number. I wonder how far it will go— Ugh.
1000635270.korean: 이걸로 세 자리 수가 되었구나. 과연 어디까지- 읏.

1000635271.english: ......Even so, wasn't that just too much?

1000635272.english: - In any case, Saraqael's long speech shows no signs of ending.
1000635272.korean: - 어차피 사라카엘의 일장연설은 끝날 기미가 보이지 않는다.

1000635273.english: It’s just that the member causing the disturbance has changed. They’re only focused on rattling off the charges, and they don’t seem to care about me at all...
1000635273.korean: - 그냥 소란을 피우는 대원이 바뀌었을 뿐이다. 저쪽도 죄목을 읊는데만 열심이지, 딱히 나한테 신경쓰는 것 같지도 않고...

1000635276.english: Are your nerves made of iron...?

1000635277.english: - While I was commanding the battle, another battle was going on in the captain's cabin.
1000635277.korean: - 내가 전투를 지휘하는 동시에, 함장실에서는 또다른 전투가 이어졌다.

1000635278.english: - When Saraqael was reciting my 200th sin, Portia came to bring me a snack, but she was startled and ran away.
1000635278.korean: - 사라카엘이 내 200번째 죄를 읊을때 쯤 포티아가 간식을 가져다 주러 왔다가 깜짝 놀라서 도망갔고,

1000635279.english: - Between the 300th and 400th, Alpha and Constance gave a weekly briefing.
1000635279.korean: - 300번째에서 400번째 사이에 알파와 콘스탄챠가 주간 브리핑을 하고 갔고,

1000635280.english: - In the 500th charge, an adversary finally appeared.

1000635281.english: Oh... I guess the angel doesn't feel any pain when he gets hit by my 'Giant Slayer'?
1000635281.korean: 오호... 천사는 내 '자이언트 슬레이어'에 얻어맞아도 안 아픈가보지?

1000635282.english: Charge forward. Even if I fall and return to the embrace of light, I will bring repentance to the Savior and to all of you.
1000635282.korean: 덤벼라. 내가 스러져 빛의 품으로 돌아가더라도, 구원자와 너희 모두를 회개시키겠다.

1000635283.english: - The moment Saraqael was tearing down the decorations he had installed, pointing out that he had hosted a pagan event, which was the 500th crime, the owner of the decorations, Barbariana, entered the captain's cabin.
1000635283.korean: - 하필 사라카엘이 500번째 죄목인, 이교도의 행사를 주관했다는 것을 지적하며 설치해둔 장식을 뜯어내는 순간, 그 장식의 주인인 바바리아나가 함장실로 들어왔다.

1000635284.english: That's what they say? Commander, can we have a go?
1000635284.korean: 그렇다는데? 사령관, 한 판 붙어도 되지?

1000635286.english: Still, I'm glad the restoration wasn't a complete failure. I'm not that type of person, but I'm just rambling on.
1000635286.korean: 그래도 복원이 완전히 실패한 것은 아니어서 다행입니다. 원래 저런 성격이 아닌데, 말만 길어지고 있군요.

1000635287.english: After the sinner is killed, the charges are recited.

1000635289.english: It is impossible for Saraqael to harm the Savior, but it is better to issue an order at this point to sort out the situation...
1000635289.korean: 사라카엘님이 구원자님에게 해를 끼치는 것은 불가능하나, 이쯤에서 명령을 내리시어 상황을 정리하심이...

1000635291.english: - I was worried that things were going too smoothly, but it just happened to be the perfect time.
1000635291.korean: - 너무 평탄하게 흘러가는 게 아닌가 싶었는데, 마침 딱 좋은 상황이 됐다.

1000635293.english: Oh! Are we really going for real?

1000635294.english: Savior...! What the hell is this!

1000635295.english: Even if you can't burn the pagan rituals, you can encourage them...!

1000635297.english: ...Good. This is my chance to purify the darkness and prove my faith.
1000635297.korean: ...좋다. 이것은 어둠을 정화하고 내 믿음을 증명할 기회.

1000635298.english: I will definitely wash away the darkness that blinds the Savior and their eyes.
1000635298.korean: 반드시 구원자와 이들의 눈을 가린 어둠을 씻어내겠다.

1000635299.english: Huiyu, you're even creating a confrontational structure? This is going to burn so hot I'm going to turn to ash~
1000635299.korean: 휘유, 대결 구도 까지 만들어주는거야? 이거, 너무 타올라서 재가 되어버리겠는걸~

1000635300.english: Of course. I'll get five date tickets, so stay tuned!
1000635300.korean: 당연하지. 데이트권 다섯 장은 따낼 테니까, 단단히 기대하고 있으라고!

1000635301.english: Would that be okay? If the product were five times...

1000635302.english: - Armand had predicted that the members' choices would all be concentrated on the first prize, a one-day date ticket.
1000635302.korean: - 어차피 대원들의 선택이 1등상인 일일 데이트권으로 몰리는 것은 아르망이 예측해주었다.

1000635303.english: - Still, five times... it might be a bit difficult.
1000635303.korean: - 그래도 다섯 배면... 조금 힘들긴 하겠군.

1000635304.english: ...Then I guess I can't just sit still either.

1000635308.english: - The captain's cabin became quiet for a moment, but as if my words had reached them, the entire Orca began to stir.
1000635308.korean: - 함장실은 순식간에 고요해졌지만, 내 말이 전파됐는지 이내 오르카 호 전체가 떠들썩해지기 시작했다.

1000635311.english: ...Haha, he wasn't just a lecherous person.

1000635312.english: - I sat down on my chair and picked up the papers again. They had piled up like this again.
1000635312.korean: - 의자에 앉아 다시 서류를 붙들었다. 그새 또 이렇게 쌓였군.

1000635313.english: - From far down the hallway, the sound of excited chatter from the agents approaching could be heard.
1000635313.korean: - 복도 저 멀리서부터, 신나게 떠드는 대원들이 가까워져 오는 소리가 들렸다.

1000635314.english: Continued from Part 2 of <Someone Wished For>.

1000635315.english: The supply plan review is complete, next is... reconnaissance.
1000635315.korean: 보급 계획 검토 끝났고, 다음은... 정찰인가.

1000635321.english: I'm sure it would be a big help?

1000635322.english: You said KeumRan went to a lot of events, right?

1000635323.english: That's great. Can you help me prepare it?

1000635324.english: ...Oh, right. If I just put a little effort into this...

1000635329.korean: 아, 그렇지. 스노우 페더, 혹시 안드바리 봤어?

1000635354.korean: 글쎄. 그렇게 입을 다물고 있으면 곧 알게 될 걸?

1000635357.english: By the way, how on earth... Oh, really?

1000635367.english: It's not like I made you cry...

1000635374.english: There's the most expensive item. Everyone will probably try to trade it for that.

1000635375.english: Then, you don't have to worry.

1000635378.english: I left it to give to Andvari.

1000635383.english: Ugh... Tell him to make sure he doesn't get hurt. I... Okay.
1000635383.korean: 끙... 일단 다치지 않게 해달라고 전해줘. 나는... 그래.

1000635384.english: I need to get some help from the experts.

1000635385.english: Let's see... I went out to the island to do some ecological research.
1000635385.korean: 보자... 섬 안쪽에 생태 조사를 나갔었지.

1000635389.english: No, is it a little different...?

1000635390.english: It's a subtle number, isn't it?

1000635403.english: Oh, right. Call me Black Wyrm.

1000635404.english: ...And ask them to smile as much as possible.

1000635415.english: Wow… our Empress is really smart, huh?

1000635416.english: Uh… you won't get hurt because of me, right?

1000635419.english: Looks like they've arrived. Come in—

1000635425.english: It's okay. I'll tell them not to do that.

1000635427.english: For now, do you want to sit there?

1000635430.english: I mean, it just looks really soft.

1000635439.english: Well… the result of relentless effort?

1000635440.english: I already mastered petting long ago.

1000635456.english: Would an assorted sushi platter be okay then?

1000635457.english: They say it's almost raw... but wouldn't it be fine?

1000635459.english: If you're not going to eat it, I will—

1000635463.english: Okay. Hirume, come here too. Let's share it among the three of us.

1000635472.english: Hirume, this is a bit of a misunderstanding...

1000635480.english: But... it doesn't matter to me.

1000635481.english: Yeah. The scouting team ran into an armored insect.

1000635486.english: Alright, begin the Orca New Year event...! Um...
1000635486.korean: 좋아, 오르카 신년 행사를 시작...! 음...

1000635487.korean: 최소한의 경계 인원만 남기고 행사를 준비해. 상품을 다섯 배로 늘린다!

1000635488.english: Yes. You may form teams if you like. Make the event grand!
1000635488.korean: 그래. 각자 팀을 짜도 좋아. 행사는 성대하게 간다!

1000635489.english: Then let's do it this way. Saraqael, do your best to stop this ritual.
1000635489.korean: 그럼 이렇게 하자. 사라카엘은 이 의식을 최선을 다해서 막아봐.

1000635492.english: I'll just handle it with my body.

1000635494.english: I don't know whether it's right or wrong, but keep thinking about it alone.
1000635494.korean: 맞는지 틀린지는 모르겠지만, 혼자만 생각하고 있어줘.

1000635495.english: The moment even a little of it spreads, it'll be a failure.

1000635498.english: I clearly told you to hand it over by hand...

1000635504.english: I see. So you snuck on like that.

1000635513.english: Hmm... Hey, Commander. Do you have a thing for weirdos? ...You should've told me sooner!&nI like weird guys like you too! Hahaha, let's live long and~ let's blow everything up~&n
1000635513.korean: 흐음… 야, 사령관. 혹시 이상한 애가 취향이야? ...진작 말하지 그랬어!&n나도 너처럼 이상한 남자가 좋거든! 꺄하핫, 우리, 오래오래 살면서~ 전부 다 터뜨려 버립시다~

1000635514.english: First, cross your hands so that your right hand is on top.
1000635514.korean: 우선 오른손이 위로 가게 손을 포개세요.

1000635522.english: Then, raise your hands to forehead height and slowly kneel down.

1000635528.english: Jim wants to receive more of that offering called New Year's money...
1000635528.korean: 짐은 그 세뱃돈이라는 공물을 더 받고 싶은데...

1000635529.english: Oh, then I'll have two chocolate bars too!
1000635529.korean: 앗, 그럼 나도 초코바 두 개 받을래!

1000635530.english: Bowing twice is a way of showing respect to the deceased.
1000635530.korean: 그... 두 번 절하는 것은 망자에 대한 예우를 표하는 것입니다.

1000635531.english: Simply put, it is done to a dead person.
1000635531.korean: 쉽게 말하면, 죽은 사람에게 하는 거예요.

1000635537.english: I thought I had suppressed it well all this time... Is this cursed power of the True Ancestor ultimately going to make me miserable...
1000635537.korean: 그간 잘 억눌러 왔다고 생각했거늘... 이 저주스러운 진조의 힘은 결국, 짐을 불행하게 만드는 것인가...

1000635538.english: We have to find the commander quickly!

1000635541.english: Uh, did I return from the afterlife...!

1000635543.english: Ugh, was it not enough after all...

1000635550.english: He received the two flying in with an excellent timed attack and gave his eyes to Geum-ran.
1000635550.korean: - 훌륭한 시간차 공격으로 날아드는 둘을 받아내고 금란에게 눈길을 주었다.

1000635551.english: As I opened the captain's quarters door, I helped Alvis up after he bumped into me and fell on his bottom, and asked.
1000635551.korean: - 함장실 문을 염과 동시에 내게 부딪혀 엉덩방아를 찧은 알비스를 일으켜주며 물었다.

1000635552.english: I was teaching them how to bow.

1000635553.english: I was practicing receiving New Year's money!

1000635555.english: A familiar doesn't die even if they receive two bows, right...? Huh, Commander...?
1000635555.korean: 권속은 절을 두 번 받더라도 죽지는 않는거지...? 응, 사령관...?

1000635557.english: Pear, if you do it a hundred times, it's a chocolate bar...

1000635558.english: Very well, familiar! Let's set off on a training journey!

1000635561.english: Geum-ran spoke cautiously to me as I saw off the two who were running off in high spirits.
1000635561.korean: - 잔뜩 신이나서 달려나가는 둘을 배웅하는 내게 금란이 조심스럽게 말을 걸었다.

1000635563.english: Whether we bow multiple times at the New Year's event or mix various cultures, we just need to happily celebrate the New Year among ourselves.
1000635563.korean: - 새해 행사에서 절을 여러 번을 하든, 여러가지 문화를 뒤섞든 우리끼리 즐겁게 새해를 기념하면 될 뿐이다.

1000635566.english: (At the same time, somewhere in Orca)

1000635567.english: That still seems a bit strange.

1000635568.english: Try making the corners of your mouth look a bit more natural like this.
1000635568.korean: 이렇게, 입가를 좀 더 자연스럽게 해봐요.

1000635570.english: Hmm, how should I explain this...

1000635571.english: ...I never imagined that a problem like this would arise.
1000635571.korean: ...이런 문제가 생길 거라고는 상상도 못 했습니다.

1000635572.english: I'm the same way. To think that someone so affectionate can't actually express themselves...
1000635572.korean: 저도 그래요. 그렇게 다정다감하면서 정작 표현을 못하다니...

1000635573.english: I understand why Miss Hirume got scared and ran away.

1000635574.english: I guess I need to practice a bit more.

1000635575.english: I see you need my help!

1000635576.english: Wouldn't it be hard to find another robot as emotional as me? Just take a look at my expression!
1000635576.korean: 저처럼 감정이 풍부한 로봇은 또 없지 않겠습니까? 제 표정을 한 번 보시지요!

1000635577.english: Here, this is a smiling face!

1000635580.english: Hmm, that's still not enough! Then, here's an angry face!
1000635580.korean: 흐음, 아직 부족하군요! 그렇다면 이건, 화난 표정!

1000635584.english: Th-then, how about this! My trump card, a confused expression!
1000635584.korean: 그, 그렇다면 이건 어떠십니까! 비장의, 혼란스러워 하는 표정!

1000635588.english: That can't be! I've prepared a total of 59 facial expression variations— No...!
1000635588.korean: 그럴리가요! 총 59종의 표정 바리에이션을 준비해 놓았는데- 아니...!

1000635590.english: Do you happen to know when it started being like this?

1000635591.english: It seems like it has been like that from the beginning.

1000635592.english: I think it's been like that from the beginning.

1000635593.korean: 이럴수가...! 왜 아무도 말해주시지 않은 겁니까!

1000635594.korean: 당장 버그를 수정하러 가야겠습니다. 이 Mr.알프레드의 작품에 이런 치명적인 결함이 발생하다니, 용납할 수 없군요!

1000635595.english: Ah, but before that, could you please help us out for a moment?
1000635595.korean: 아~ 그 전에 잠깐, 저희 좀 도와주시겠어요~?

1000635596.english: I need a few things to prepare for the event.
1000635596.korean: 행사 준비를 위해서 좀 필요한 게 있거든요~

1000635598.korean: 주방에서 접시 몇 개만 가져다 주세요~

1000635599.english: Plates...? Aha, so this is the culture of a country far to the west!
1000635599.korean: 접시...? 아하, 이건 서쪽 멀리 있는 나라의 문화로군요!

1000635600.english: We ask for your help. We are planning to land on a large island soon for exploration.
1000635600.korean: 부탁드립니다. 저희는 곧 탐색을 위해 큰 섬에 상륙할 예정이라서요.

1000635602.english: Let's see. The supply plan for the first half of the year... Konstancia handled it...
1000635602.korean: - 어디보자. 상반기 보급 계획은... 콘스탄챠가 처리해줬고...
