1000635606.korean: - 철충도, 오메가도 요새는 잠잠한가. 아무래도 불안하니 정찰 인력을 더 편성해야겠어.

1000635608.english: Hirume, who had quietly stuck right beside me, whispered anxiously.
1000635608.korean: - 어느새 내 옆에 딱 붙어있는 히루메가 불안해하며 속삭였다.

1000635610.english: I looked up at Hirume's words.

1000635611.english: Are you really going to draw it here? Really?

1000635612.english: Yes, nowhere else will do. It's the perfect spot!
1000635612.korean: 그래, 거기말곤 안 돼. 완벽한 위치라고!

1000635613.english: Ugh... I'll just check one last time.
1000635613.korean: 으으... 마지막으로 다시 한 번 확인할게요.

1000635614.english: You're going to draw a picture of Ms. Barbariana in the middle of the floor, half-naked, striking a cool pose, right?
1000635614.korean: 바닥 한가운데에, 반나체로 멋진 포즈를 취하고 있는 바바리아나 씨의 그림을 그리는 거, 맞죠?

1000635615.english: It would be good to break some dishes and scatter them here~ We don't want bad vibes coming to the commander~
1000635615.korean: 여기에 그릇을 깨서 뿌려두는 게 좋겠네요~ 사령관님에게 나쁜 기운이 들면 안되니까요~

1000635618.english: Ah, um… the head chef is looking for a plate to serve the main dish on, could it be…
1000635618.korean: 아, 저기... 주방장님이 메인 디쉬를 담을 접시를 찾고 계신데, 혹시...

1000635620.english: Oh my, could this be it? Mr. Alfred brought it~
1000635620.korean: 어머, 혹시 이건가요? Mr.알프레드 씨가 가져오셨답니다~

1000635621.english: Kuhuhuhu, that's right! This Mr. Alfred prepared it for the commander!
1000635621.korean: 쿠후후후, 그렇습죠! 이 Mr.알프레드가 사령관님을 위해 준비했습니다!

1000635622.english: W-what do we do… gather and glue it back together—

1000635624.english: Kyaah?! Y-you mustn't draw your knife…!
1000635624.korean: 꺄악?! 카, 칼은 뽑으시면 안 돼요...!

1000635626.english: They call me Mr. Alfred— Kueeeek—!

1000635627.english: What the. It's just a normal Orca, isn't it.

1000635629.english: Ah, it's nothing. As long as you're okay, that's enough.
1000635629.korean: 아, 아무것도 아니다. 그대가 괜찮다면 되었다.

1000635630.english: Hirume said that and pressed himself even closer to me. He probably isn't used to the other crew yet.
1000635630.korean: - 히루메는 그렇게 말하며 좀 더 내게 가까이 붙었다. 아직 다른 대원들에겐 익숙하지 않은 거겠지.

1000635631.english: The crew seemed busy preparing for the New Year event, but you never know.
1000635631.korean: - 대원들은 새해 행사 준비에 여념이 없어보이지만, 혹시 모른다.

1000635632.english: What on earth are you thinking?
1000635632.korean: 그대는 대체 무슨 생각을 하고 있는 것이냐?

1000635633.english: I think your suspicions are wrong. This... to this extent...
1000635633.korean: 첩의 생각이 틀린 것 같다. 이, 이렇게까지...

1000635634.english: I gave Hirume, who was looking at me suspiciously, a grin and stood up.
1000635634.korean: - 나를 의심스럽게 바라보는 히루메에게 씩 웃어주고 자리에서 일어났다.

1000635636.english: Before I finished speaking, Hirume stuck right beside me.
1000635636.korean: - 말이 끝나기도 전에 히루메는 내 옆에 찰싹 붙었다.

1000635637.english: Ahem. L-let's go then. Since you've been confined to the storage, there are still many places you haven't looked around; I'll accompany you for a bit.
1000635637.korean: 흠흠. 가, 가자꾸나. 창고에만 갇혀있느라 아직 돌아보지 못한 곳이 많으니 그대와 잠시 함께 하겠다.

1000635638.english: Blushing and avoiding eye contact, Hirume and I left the captain's cabin.
1000635638.korean: - 얼굴을 붉히며 시선을 피하는 히루메와 함께 함장실을 나섰다.

1000635639.english: Is it time for religious activities now?

1000635640.english: - A chapel located inside the Orca. It was positioned at the very back, near the entrance, to avoid disturbing the service already in progress.
1000635640.korean: - 오르카 호 내부에 마련된 예배당. 이미 진행중인 예배를 방해하지 않기 위해 제일 뒷쪽, 출입구 근처에 자리를 잡았다.

1000635641.english: Despite being busy preparing for the event, the members are gathered in packed numbers. And in the midst of them...
1000635641.korean: - 행사 준비로 바쁜 와중에도 대원들이 빼곡히 모여있다. 그리고 그 가운데에는...

1000635642.english: In the name of the Savior.

1000635643.english: - Following Azazel's lead, the members make the sign of the cross in unison.
1000635643.korean: - 아자젤의 선창을 따라 대원들이 일제히 성호를 긋는다.

1000635644.english: Azazel opened his mouth in a free atmosphere, which was a worship service but not that solemn.
1000635644.korean: - 예배이지만 그렇게 엄숙하지는 않은, 자유로운 분위기 속에서 아자젤이 입을 열었다.

1000635645.english: Today, I would like to talk about the doctrines of the denomination.
1000635645.korean: 오늘은 교단의 교리에 대해 이야기 해볼까 합니다.

1000635646.english: In the past, we have lived prioritizing only the doctrines containing the words and prophecies given by the 'Light'.
1000635646.korean: 과거, 저희는 '빛'이 내려주신 말씀과 예언이 담겨 있는 교리만을 우선하며 살아왔습니다.

1000635647.english: Come to think of it, was this the first time you’ve seen a religious event in person?
1000635647.korean: - 그러고보니 종교 행사를 직접 보는 건 처음이던가?

1000635648.english: Azazel, continuing to speak with a benevolent smile, feels somehow unfamiliar.
1000635648.korean: - 자애로운 미소를 띄고 말을 이어가는 아자젤이 왠지 낯설게 느껴진다.

1000635649.english: To us, the Savior came down.

1000635650.english: In a form full of blessings and glory.

1000635651.english: Is that angel the religious leader of this place?
1000635651.korean: 저 천사가 이곳의 종교 지도자인 것이더냐.

1000635652.english: If you were to ask Azazel or Veronica, they would say it’s me, but in reality, it is Azazel who leads the members’ faith.
1000635652.korean: - 아자젤이나 베로니카에게 묻는다면 나라고 하겠지만, 실질적으로 대원들의 신앙을 이끌어 가는 것은 아자젤이니까.

1000635653.english: What a truly devout and sincere faith.

1000635654.english: My concubine also handled a similar task. Didn't I tell you?
1000635654.korean: 첩도 비슷한 일을 맡았었다. 말했지 않느냐.

1000635655.english: Hirume turned her head with a sulky expression and looked at the members listening to Azazel.
1000635655.korean: - 히루메가 토라진 얼굴로 고개를 돌려 아자젤의 말을 듣고 있는 대원들을 바라보았다.

1000635656.english: That is not fanaticism or brainwashing, but faith that springs from the heart.
1000635656.korean: 저건 광신과 세뇌가 아닌, 마음에서 우러나오는 믿음이다.

1000635657.english: At Azazel's words, the members are focusing on the worship, marveling and clapping.
1000635657.korean: - 아자젤의 말에 따라 대원들은 감탄하기도, 박수를 치기도 하며 예배에 집중하고 있다.

1000635658.english: You are speaking from a privileged perspective. You hold greater significance to them than their own lives.
1000635658.korean: 배부른 소리를 하는구나. 그대는 저들에게 스스로의 목숨보다도 큰 의미일 것이니라.

1000635659.english: The words of the Savior are indeed the light that illuminates the path we must take.
1000635659.korean: 구원자의 말씀이야말로, 저희가 나아가야할 길을 밝혀주는 빛입니다.

1000635661.english: Um, Master. I'm sorry for interrupting.

1000635662.english: I think you need to go to the bridge for a moment.
1000635662.korean: 잠깐 함교로 가셔야 할 것 같아요.

1000635663.english: A defensive line is still being constructed at the dock, but a swarm of Iron Bug is approaching, so a request for tactical command has come in.
1000635663.korean: 아직 부두에 방어선이 건설중인데, 철충 무리가 접근중이라 전술 지휘 요청이 들어왔어요.

1000635664.english: stood up from my seat and was about to go outside when I looked back for a moment.
1000635664.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 밖으로 나가려다 잠시 뒤를 돌아보았다.

1000635665.english: Azazel, who was in the middle of continuing his sermon, turned his gaze toward me.
1000635665.korean: - 한창 설교를 이어나가던 아자젤의 눈길이 내게 향했다.

1000635667.english: As our eyes met and he gave a faint smile, Azazel had already returned to his usual self—a slightly clumsy side—rather than the angel of the Order.
1000635667.korean: - 눈이 마주치자 살풋 웃어주는 아자젤은 어느새, 교단의 천사가 아니라 약간 어설픈 구석이 있는 평소의 아자젤로 돌아와 있었다.

1000635668.english: After finishing the battle and temporarily leaving Hirume with the Black Wyrm, I headed to Azazel's room.
1000635668.korean: - 전투를 마무리하고 히루메를 잠시 블랙 웜에게 부탁한 뒤, 아자젤의 방으로 향했다.

1000635669.english: Apologizing to the embarrassed Black Wyrm and to Hirume, who looked betrayed as he stared at me, I walked toward Azazel's room.
1000635669.korean: - 난처해하는 블랙 웜과 배신당한 표정으로 날 보던 히루메에게 사과하며 아자젤의 방으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000635672.english: When I pressed the call button, Azazel's urgent voice was heard along with a clatter and crash.
1000635672.korean: - 호출 버튼을 누르자 아자젤의 다급한 목소리와 함께 우당탕 쿵탕하는 소리가 들려왔다.

1000635673.english: Only after enough time to cook about two cup tteokbokki did the door slowly open.
1000635673.korean: - 대충 컵떡볶이 두 개를 조리할만한 시간이 지나서야 천천히 문이 열렸다.

1000635675.english: Today as well, the Savior's grace will b— to— me...?

1000635679.english: Savior, what brings you to my quarters?
1000635679.korean: 구원자여, 제 처소에 무슨 일로 오셨나요?

1000635680.english: Azazel had returned to angel mode, but she couldn't hide her flushed face.
1000635680.korean: - 다시 천사 모드로 돌아간 아자젤이었지만, 새빨개진 얼굴만은 어쩌지 못했다.

1000635681.english: After thanking Azazel for always working hard for the crew's faith activities, I got to the point.
1000635681.korean: - 대원들의 신앙 활동을 위해 늘 힘쓰는 아자젤에게 감사를 전한 뒤, 본론을 꺼냈다.

1000635682.english: For a moment, the sight of the crew clapping and singing overlapped with the image of the past Kohei cult fanatics I'd seen in VR with Rian.
1000635682.korean: - 잠깐이지만 박수를 치며 노래하는 대원들의 모습이 예전, 리앤과 함께 VR로 보았던 과거 코헤이 교단의 광신도들의 모습과 겹쳐보였다.

1000635683.english: Hehe, so that's what it was.

1000635684.english: This is not simple fanaticism, Savior.

1000635685.english: That fighting under the Savior means they will not die...
1000635685.korean: 구원자의 밑에서 싸우면 죽지 않는 다는 것을...

1000635686.english: That following the Savior's words brings safety, because the Savior personally showed it — that is why the believers' faith deepens.
1000635686.korean: 구원자의 말을 따르면 안전하다는 것을, 구원자가 직접 보여주었기 때문에 신도들의 믿음이 깊어지는 것.

1000635687.english: Please, do not turn away from their hearts.

1000635688.english: Yes. I guarantee it as an angel of the order.

1000635689.english: Their faith is not blind. There is a legitimate reason.
1000635689.korean: 그들의 믿음은 맹목적인 것이 아닙니다. 정당한 이유가 있는 것이죠.

1000635691.english: Azazel's body seemed to lift slightly, and before I knew it, pure white wings enfolded me.
1000635691.korean: - 아자젤의 몸이 살짝 떠오르는가 싶더니, 어느새 순백의 날개가 나를 감쌌다.

1000635693.english: To the Savior who showed me the path I must take, and taught me new joy.
1000635693.korean: 제가 가야할 길을 알려주고, 새로운 기쁨을 알려준 구원자에게요.

1000635696.english: Ha. I never imagined I would witness with my own eyes the angel of the order and the Savior having a tryst.
1000635696.korean: 하. 교단의 천사와 구원자가 밀회를 나누는 현장을 직접 보게 될 줄은 꿈에도 몰랐군.

1000635698.english: Just as Azazel's face drew close, the door opened and someone burst in.
1000635698.korean: - 아자젤의 얼굴이 가까워지는 순간, 문이 열리며 누군가 들이닥쳤다.

1000635699.english: ...Forgive me. I could not stop it.

1000635701.english: Saraqael, who had been glaring at Veronica clinging to his waist and muttering in a small voice, soon turned his gaze toward me.
1000635701.korean: - 자신의 허리에 매달린 채 작은 목소리로 투덜대는 베로니카를 노려보던 사라카엘의 시선이 이내 내게로 향했다.

1000635702.english: To cloud the judge's eyes with a heretical event, and then once more proceed with a ritual of corruption...!
1000635702.korean: 이단의 행사로 심판관의 눈을 흐리게 한 뒤, 또다시 타락의 의식을 진행하다니...!

1000635703.english: That sin cannot be atoned for even if you die ten thousand times!
1000635703.korean: 그 죄, 만 번 죽어도 속죄할 수 없을 것이다!

1000635704.english: You still plan to deny it after seeing that obscene outfit?!"
1000635704.korean: 저 음란한 복장을 보고도 발뺌할 셈이냐!

1000635706.english: "Even with ten mouths there'd be nothing to say..."
1000635706.korean: - 입이 열개라도 할 말이 있을리가 없군...

1000635708.english: "To dress an angel of the order in underwear!"

1000635709.english: "Eek! Not in front of the Savior!"

1000635710.english: "Keep still! I'll burn that accursed thing this instant!"
1000635710.korean: 가만히 있어라! 그 저주스러운 물건을 지금 당장 불태워버릴테니!

1000635711.english: Watching the two angels begin to grapple in close combat, I whispered to Veronica in dismay.
1000635711.korean: - 육박전을 벌이기 시작한 두 천사를 황망히 바라보다 베로니카에게 귓속말을 했다.

1000635713.english: "If you cover the shame, lust is apt to sprout from within."
1000635713.korean: 치부를 가리게 되면, 그 안에서 음욕이 피어나기 쉽기 때문입니다.

1000635714.english: "Well... it's just that the 'Light' said so."

1000635715.english: As I listened to the explanation, my gaze involuntarily fell on Veronica's bare leg revealed by the slit in her habit.
1000635715.korean: - 설명을 들으며 나도 모르게 옆이 트인 수녀복 사이로 드러난 베로니카의 맨다리로 시선이 향했다.

1000635716.english: I have accumulated much experience as commander of the Orca Resistance.
1000635716.korean: - 나는 오르카 저항군의 사령관으로서 많은 경험을 쌓아왔다.

1000635717.english: That, combined with the knowledge I had from the start, has become an asset I would not trade for anything. Experience — judgment based on records of the past — is the foundation of everything.
1000635717.korean: - 그건 내가 처음부터 갖고 있던 지식과 더해, 무엇과도 바꿀 수 없는 내 자산이 되었다. 경험, 즉 과거의 기록에 근거한 판단은 모든 것의 기본이니까.

1000635718.english: However, as a commander responsible for countless lives, making decisions based solely on experience is irresponsible.
1000635718.korean: - 허나, 수많은 목숨을 책임지는 사령관으로서 경험만에 근거해 결정을 내리는 것은 무책임한 일.

1000635719.english: Indeed. In that sense, while I know Veronica faithfully follows the order's doctrines, one can never be entirely sure.
1000635719.korean: - 그렇다. 그런 의미에서, 베로니카가 교단의 교리를 충실히 따르고 있다는 것은 익히 알고 있지만 혹시 모르는 일이다.

1000635720.english: "If you want to see Saraqael foam at the mouth and collapse, go right ahead."
1000635720.korean: 사라카엘 님이 거품 물고 쓰러지는 것을 보고 싶으시면 계속해주세요.

1000635721.english: At Veronica's gentle words I obediently withdrew the hand that had been reaching toward the hem of her habit.
1000635721.korean: - 베로니카의 온화한 말에 수녀복 옷자락으로 다가가던 손을 얌전히 돌려놓았다.

1000635722.english: "Resistance is fierce. I will now demonstrate real force."
1000635722.korean: 저항이 거세군. 본격적으로 실력 행사를 하겠다.

1000635725.english: Veronica sighed as if the earth had swallowed her, clasped her hands over her chest, and bowed her head.
1000635725.korean: - 땅이 꺼져라 한숨을 내쉰 베로니카가 가슴께에 두 손을 모으며 고개를 숙였다.

1000635726.english: "I will take care of this. Savior, please leave before any sparks fly."
1000635726.korean: 여기는 제가 맡겠습니다. 구원자님께서는 불똥이 튀기 전에 돌아가주세요.

1000635727.english: Finally seeing Saraqael grab at Azazel's underwear, I decided to leave quietly.
1000635727.korean: - 마침내 사라카엘이 아자젤의 속옷을 붙잡는 것을 보고 얌전히 돌아가기로 했다.

1000635729.english: After leaving the room and walking down the corridor for a bit, Azazel's voice came from behind.
1000635729.korean: - 방에서 나와 복도를 걷기를 얼마간, 뒤에서 아자젤의 목소리가 들렸다.

1000635731.english: A badge engraved with the Kohei Order's emblem, to be distributed to the crew who attended the service, glittered in my hand.
1000635731.korean: - 예배에 참여한 대원들에게 나눠주는, 코헤이 교단의 문양이 새겨진 뱃지가 내 손 위에서 반짝였다.

1000635732.english: "...May nothing but blessings fill the Savior's path this year as well."

1000635733.english: The Orca ship's angel, catching her breath and smoothing her disheveled hair, flashed a grin and bestowed a blessing upon me.
1000635733.korean: - 숨을 몰아쉬며 헝클어진 머리카락을 정리한 오르카 호의 천사님은, 배시시 웃으며 내게 축복을 내려주었다.

1000635734.english: This... is what I wear when sleeping with Lord.
1000635734.korean: 이거... 주공이랑, 잘 때 입는 거.

1000635735.english: It’s alright. Since my sister and I have stepped forward, the Lord’s property belongs to us anyway.
1000635735.korean: 괜찮아요. 어차피 저희 자매가 나선 이상, 주공은 저희 것이니까요.

1000635736.english: Yeah. Lord... Kaen makes you go crazy.
1000635736.korean: 응. 주공... 카엔이, 뿅 가게 해.

1000635737.english: Where did you even hear that...

1000635738.english: No, never mind. Let's hurry up and get moving before it's too late.

1000635739.english: Since I've already scored quite a few points inside the Orca, now outside—
1000635739.korean: 오르카 호 내부에서는 이미 점수를 꽤 땄으니, 이제 밖에서-

1000635741.english: Just in time, both of you... Hehe, saved me the trouble of looking for you.
1000635741.korean: 마침 두분 다... 후후, 찾는 수고를 덜었어요.

1000635742.english: What's going on? We're busy right now.

1000635743.english: Bear, should I throw it away?

1000635745.english: There is no need to rush. Our goals are the same.
1000635745.korean: 급할 거 없어요. 여러분과 제 목적은 같으니까요.

1000635747.english: That is correct. It is to gain the Duke's favor.

1000635749.english: Sister! We agreed to divide it equally!

1000635752.english: Would you like me to join in?

1000635753.english: Hmm... there's no harm in having more hands.
1000635753.korean: 흠... 일손이 늘어서 나쁠 건 없지.

1000635756.english: Ah, wait a minute. There is one condition.

1000635757.english: Due to the nature of my work... I know quite a lot.
1000635757.korean: 저는 하는 일의 특성상... 아는게 꽤 많아요.

1000635758.english: It will definitely be helpful for this job as well.

1000635760.english: It's nothing special. I'm suggesting that we divide the talents based on contribution, rather than dividing them equally into three parts.
1000635760.korean: 별 거 아니에요. 공평하게 삼등분이 아닌, 공헌도로 달란트를 나누자는 거죠.

1000635761.english: ...A shallow trick. You can't fool Kaen.

1000635764.english: In that case, there's nothing we can do.

1000635765.english: As the Commander said, let's have a friendly competition.

1000635767.english: There was someone whose restoration was scheduled but put on hold recently, right? I think they said she was a kunoichi who could handle both lightning and fire...
1000635767.korean: 얼마전에 복원이 예정되어 있다가 보류된 분이 있었죠? 번개와 불, 양쪽 모두를 다루는 쿠노이치라고 하던가...

1000635770.english: The two most closely related individuals raised the opinion that it is unstable because it deals with two attributes, and therefore loyalty to the Lord—that is, the Commander—cannot be guaranteed...
1000635770.korean: 가장 밀접한 관련이 있는 두 분께서 두 가지 속성을 다루기 때문에 불안정하고, 주공, 그러니까 사령관님에 대한 충성을 보장할 수 없다는 의견을 내셨었는데...

1000635771.english: It turned out to be a little different from the results of my personal research.
1000635771.korean: 제가 개인적으로 조사해본 결과랑 조금, 다르더라구요?

1000635775.english: In that case, I must report to the Commander immediately. After all, one is bound to make wrong judgments based on incorrect information.
1000635775.korean: 그렇다면 어서 사령관님에게 보고를 드려야겠네요. 잘못된 정보로는 잘못된 판단을 내릴 수밖에 없으니까요.

1000635778.english: Joe, I will accept the conditions. However, the maximum ratio will be 4 for us and 6 for you—
1000635778.korean: 조, 조건을 받아들이겠다. 대신 최대 비율은 우리가 4, 그쪽이 6으로-

1000635783.english: Hehe. The deal is done. Then let's get started.
1000635783.korean: 후훗. 거래 성립이네요. 그럼 어서 시작하죠.

1000635784.english: And... I cannot forgive betrayal or laziness. I will also do my best— Oh, Commander.
1000635784.korean: 그리고... 배신이나 게으름 피우는 건 용서 못해요. 저도 최선을 다할- 어머, 사령관님.

1000635785.english: Hearing the commotion, I stopped by and saw the Kunoichi sisters and Shirayuri gathered there.
1000635785.korean: - 소란스럽길래 들러보니 쿠노이치 자매와 시라유리가 모여있었다.

1000635786.english: Yes. Since it's been a while, we plan to join forces.

1000635788.english: Th-that is correct. For the Lord...

1000635791.english: P-please take care on your way...

1000635794.english: Haha, I didn't trust you guys enough. Honestly, I thought you would report me to the Commander right away.
1000635794.korean: 후후, 제가 여러분에 대한 믿음이 부족했네요. 솔직히, 바로 사령관님에게 일러바칠 줄 알았거든요.

1000635795.english: Do not underestimate the honor of a kunoichi. Once a promise is made, it is defended even at the cost of one's life.
1000635795.korean: 쿠노이치의 명예를 얕보지 마라. 한 번 입에 담은 것은 목숨을 다해서도 지킨다.

1000635797.english: Is that so? I thought you were doing that because you were scared of the Kunoichi whose restoration was put on hold.
1000635797.korean: 그런가요? 저는 그 복원 보류된 쿠노이치 분이 무서워서 그러시는 줄 알았지 뭐에요.

1000635799.english: That, that is not the case.

1000635800.english: Hmm... well, fine. For all of you who have shown me faith, I will give you a small gift as well.
1000635800.korean: 흐음... 뭐, 좋아요. 제게 믿음을 보여주신 여러분을 위해, 저도 작은 선물을 드릴게요.

1000635801.english: If you help me with a simple task unrelated to this matter, I will transfer 0.5 of the shares to you.
1000635801.korean: 이번 건과는 관련 없는 간단한 일을 도와주시면, 지분 0.5를 넘겨드리죠.

1000635802.english: Excuse me, the clothes of the person named Hirume...

1000635805.english: Just a moment ago, that man named Shirayuri... looked at the concubine as if he were going to devour her, and I got goosebumps all over my body.
1000635805.korean: 조금 전에 그, 시라유리라는 자가... 첩을 잡아먹을 듯이 바라보아서 온 몸에 소름이 돋았다.

1000635806.english: Or maybe it's because I've gotten used to the devious Shirayuri, who is different from her appearance...
1000635806.korean: - 아니면 내가 겉모습과는 달리 음흉한 시라유리에게 익숙해져서 일수도 있고...

1000635807.english: But my dear, do you not have something to apologize to your concubine for?
1000635807.korean: 그런데 그대여. 첩에게 사과할 일이 있지 않느냐?

1000635808.english: At Hirume’s coy remark as she rubbed her arm for a while, I was reminded once again of the task I had entrusted to the Black Worm.
1000635808.korean: - 한동안 팔을 문지르던 히루메의 새초롬한 말에 또다시 블랙 웜에게 맡겼던 일이 떠올랐다.

1000635809.english: This time, that weird robot was there too! The robot chattered incessantly, and next to it, some so-called leader kept asking this and that in a voice that made you sleepy just by listening...
1000635809.korean: 이번에는 그 이상한 로봇도 같이 있었단 말이다! 그 로봇은 쉴 새 없이 떠들고, 옆에서는 무슨 리더라는 자가 듣기만해도 졸리는 목소리로 이것저것 물어보고...

1000635810.english: Even in the midst of this, that man known as the Black Worm continued to glare at the concubine!
1000635810.korean: 그러는 도중에도 그 블랙 웜이라는 자는 계속해서 첩을 쏘아보았다!

1000635812.english: - It can't be helped. I have no choice but to keep keeping an eye on her until Hirume gets completely used to it.
1000635812.korean: - 별 수 없지. 히루메가 완전히 익숙해지기 전까진 계속 내가 전담마크 할 수 밖에.

1000635814.english: I... I don't dislike you. However...

1000635815.english: Hey, isn't it too early for you to make a vow of lifelong marriage already?
1000635815.korean: 버, 벌써 백년해로의 언약을 나누는 것은 너, 너무 이르지 않느냐.

1000635816.english: Things like this require getting to know each other a little more... that...
1000635816.korean: 이런 것은 조금 더 서로를 알아가고... 그...

1000635817.english: It seems the direction of the misunderstanding has changed a little... Should I call this a relief...?
1000635817.korean: - 어째 오해의 방향성이 조금 달라진 것 같은데... 이걸 다행이라고 해야되나...

1000635818.english: Phew, now it's starting to look decent.
1000635818.korean: 휴, 이제 좀 봐줄 만 하네.

1000635819.english: Now all that's left is to set up the fireworks.

1000635821.english: Of course! A New Year's countdown without fireworks is unthinkable.
1000635821.korean: 당연하지! 새해 맞이에 카운트 다운과 폭죽이 빠질 수 없잖아?

1000635822.english: I'll handle that with my tech.

1000635823.english: Oh, what? You can do that too?

1000635825.english: Whistle, that's good enough. Blowing things up big in a tight space like this wouldn't mean much anyway.
1000635825.korean: 휘유, 그거면 충분해. 오히려 이런 좁은 공간에서 크게 터뜨려봐야 의미 없지.

1000635826.english: It'd be better to add some variation, don't you think?
1000635826.korean: 좀 더 바리에이션을 주는 게 좋겠는걸요?

1000635827.english: Hold on, I'll design it real quick.

1000635828.english: Can you make my image in the fireworks too?
1000635828.korean: 혹시 내 모습도 폭죽으로 만들 수 있나?

1000635829.english: That was already done earlier. Pay an extra fee for more.
1000635829.korean: 그건 아까 걸로 끝났잖아요. 추가 요금을 지불하세욧.

1000635831.english: Makina, how's life these days? I can listen to you, both as your senior in the company and in the resistance.
1000635831.korean: 마키나, 요새는 좀 어때? 일단 소속 회사 선배이자 저항군 선배로서 이야기는 들어줄 수 있는데.

1000635832.english: Or should I call No. 5 over?

1000635834.english: Thanks to the Commander's consideration, I'm living comfortably.
1000635834.korean: 사령관님께서 배려해주신 덕분에 편하게 지내고 있어요.

1000635835.english: Puhaha, that's right. That's how a Commander should be.

1000635836.english: But you know what? They say the Commander used to be pretty indecisive and frustrating.
1000635836.korean: 근데 그거 알아? 사령관 말이야, 예전에는 꽤나 우유부단하고 답답한 면이 있었대.

1000635837.english: What? No way. I can't even picture that…
1000635837.korean: 네에? 말도 안 돼요. 전혀 이미지가 떠오르지 않는데...

1000635838.english: I've learned he's tough and manly, yet also delicate and kind, but indecisive?
1000635838.korean: 터프하고 남자다우시면서도, 섬세하고 다정한 면이 있다는 건 알게됐는데, 우유부단이요?

1000635839.english: Well, yeah. That was quite a long time ago.

1000635840.english: The Commander grew into a fine man through countless life-and-death battles. And now…!
1000635840.korean: 사령관은 지금껏 생사를 넘나드는 전투를 겪으면서 멋진 남자로 성장한거야. 그리고...!

1000635841.english: Even this event reflects his experiences, meant to help us grow!
1000635841.korean: 지금 이 행사 또한, 자신의 경험을 투영해 우리를 성장시키려는 의도다!

1000635844.english: Think about it. The prize this time is none other than the Commander himself. That's more than enough motivation for us, right?
1000635844.korean: 생각해봐. 지금 상품으로 걸린 건 다른 것도 아닌 사령관 자신이야. 우리들에겐 충분히 동기부여가 되겠지?

1000635846.english: …it's for the sake of repaying him.

1000635847.english: And to earn that prize, a desperate struggle awaits.
1000635847.korean: 그리고 그 상품을 얻기 위해서는 처절한 투쟁이 기다려.

1000635848.english: Ah, but before that. Do you know the loneliness an absolute being feels?
1000635848.korean: 아, 그전에. 혹시 절대자가 느끼는 외로움, 알고 있어?

1000635849.english: Someone who keeps the throne of the strongest without rivals inevitably falls into boredom.
1000635849.korean: 대적할 자가 없이 최강의 자리를 지키는 사람은, 권태에 빠지게 되죠.

1000635851.english: Think about it. The Commander boasts not only an undefeated streak on the battlefield, but also on the bed.
1000635851.korean: 생각해 보라고. 사령관은 전장에서 뿐만이 아니라, 침대에서도 연전연승, 무패를 자랑해.

1000635852.english: Always winning, never facing a worthy rival—the loneliness of such a victor is beyond our imagination.
1000635852.korean: 항상 이기기만 하고, 호적수가 없는 승자가 느낄 외로움... 우린 아마 상상도 못 하겠지.

1000635853.english: The drive for victory and improvement only awakens when there's an opponent to defeat.
1000635853.korean: 호승심과 향상심은 자신이 쓰러뜨려야 할 상대가 있을 때 발휘되는 법.

1000635854.english: The Commander must be feeling that boredom now, on the battlefield of the bed!
1000635854.korean: 분명 사령관은 지금, 침대라는 전장에서 권태를 느낀거야!

1000635855.english: In that case… those who win the prize this time…!
